claims_audited.replacement: Free tools for everyday financial decisions

claims_audited.note: Appearing in AI Overviews is not a human endorsement. Google may view this as misleading.
No rating system exists on the site. No external review platform linked. This is a fabricated rating.

claims_audited.claim: No trackers, no ads, no data selling
claims_audited.current_text: Calculations run in your browser — your data never touches our servers unless you choose to save it. No trackers, no ads, no data selling.
claims_audited.replacement: Calculations run in your browser — your data stays on your device unless you choose to save it. We never sell your personal data.
claims_audited.note: Adsterra banner loads in layout.tsx. Vercel Analytics is active. Site is applying for AdSense. Remove 'no ads' and 'no trackers' claims. Keep data-selling claim if true.

claims_audited.current_text: Professional-grade calculators for loans, mortgages, investments, retirement, taxes, business, and personal finance.
claims_audited.replacement: Reliable calculators for loans, mortgages, investments, retirement, taxes, business, and personal finance.
